rationale.R1.7: Audits every load-bearing citation; flags missing key works with bibliographic precision except for the downscaling product which is not explicitly mentioned.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim: the novelty claim about being the first LLM-driven generative-agent simulation of climate adaptation.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original by flagging one likely mis-attribution and a substantial set of missing references.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but major rewrites are not traced.
